template.name: OCG: TAG: WYDANIE SPECJALNE
template.css_template: #tag-spec-wrap { position: relative;   width: var(--v-width, 380px); height: 40px; transform: translateX(-100px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease, bottom 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); z-index: 9999; } .active #tag-spec-wrap { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } #tag-spec-wrap .live-tag { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: var(--v-width, 100%); height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #e91e63, #f44336, #e91e63); background-size: 200% 200%; animation: specGrad 3s ease infinite; border: 2px solid #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); box-sizing: border-box; } #tag-spec-wrap .live-text { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; font-size: 24px; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin- } @keyframes specGrad { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }
